prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: featured listing cover
Primary request: editorial exterior photo of a large detached villa in a leafy upscale Nairobi-inspired neighborhood
Scene/backdrop: gated residential setting with mature greenery, tidy compound, premium but believable surroundings
Subject: detached villa exterior with tasteful architecture and elegant landscaping
Style/medium: premium editorial real estate photography
Composition/framing: strong single-subject frame optimized for listing cards and featured sections
Lighting/mood: warm daylight with soft shadows, inviting and trustworthy
Color palette: stone, beige, olive, charcoal, natural greens
Materials/textures: stucco, stone, glass, metal gate details, trimmed lawn
Constraints: no text, no signage, no logos, no watermark, no people, no impossible geometry

Constraints: no text, no logos, no watermark, no people, no uncanny furniture, no distorted windows
